message:
fix(types): cancel chain depth and wasm_abi state transition bugs

cancel.rs: use 1 instead of chain_depth() in with_cause_limited since
self.cause will be replaced — old chain depth was stale.

wasm_abi.rs: add InvalidStateTransition error variant so boundary
transition failures report from/to states instead of misusing
InvalidTransfer. Cap transition_log and transition_history at 256
entries to prevent unbounded growth in long-running SPAs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
